title: Painterly Luminescence
description: Un style de peinture numérique contemporain et chaleureux, caractérisé par des coups de pinceau épais et expressifs et l'absence de contours distincts. Il repose sur un contraste dramatique d'éclairage chaud-froid, où des lumières intenses et localisées projettent des reflets doux et chauds contre un environnement froid, atmosphérique et aux tons pastel. L'esthétique globale rappelle l'art conceptuel d'animation haut de gamme, mêlant un blocage de couleurs impressionniste à des ambiances magiques et sereines.
description_en: A cozy, contemporary digital painting style characterized by chunky, expressive brushstrokes and a lack of distinct outlines. It relies on dramatic warm-cool lighting contrast, where intense, localized glowing lights cast soft, warm reflections against a cool, atmospheric, pastel-toned environment. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of high-end animation concept art, blending impressionistic color blocking with magical, serene moods.
description_fr: Un style de peinture numérique contemporain et chaleureux, caractérisé par des coups de pinceau épais et expressifs et l'absence de contours distincts. Il repose sur un contraste dramatique d'éclairage chaud-froid, où des lumières intenses et localisées projettent des reflets doux et chauds contre un environnement froid, atmosphérique et aux tons pastel. L'esthétique globale rappelle l'art conceptuel d'animation haut de gamme, mêlant un blocage de couleurs impressionniste à des ambiances magiques et sereines.
prompt: Render a contemporary digital painting characterized by chunky, expressive brushstrokes and opaque layering, reminiscent of high-end animation visual development art. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering technique relies entirely on color blocking and value contrast to define forms, strictly avoiding any thin line work or distinct outlines. The lighting anatomy features a dramatic warm-cool contrast: intense, localized glowing light sources cast radiant {{accent_color}} bounce light and soft subsurface scattering effects across the surfaces, while the environment is bathed in a diffused, cool {{primary_color}} ambient light. Background elements fade into soft, low-contrast {{secondary_color}} hues, creating deep atmospheric perspective. The texture mimics a chalky digital impasto, with visible, faceted brush marks that give the surfaces a tactile, handcrafted feel. Edges of subjects should be softly feathered and painterly, blending organically with the surrounding atmosphere rather than appearing as sharp vector cuts. The emotional register is magical, serene, and cozy, achieved through the luminous glow against the cooler twilight tones. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. digital painting, chunky brushstrokes, animation concept art, warm-cool contrast, glowing lighting, color blocking, impasto digital, painterly edges, atmospheric perspective, magical atmosphere, visual development, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A serene, atmospheric environment painted in a contemporary digital style with chunky, expressive brushstrokes and opaque layering. The scene features deep atmospheric perspective, where foreground terrain defined by sweeping {{primary_color}} color blocks transitions seamlessly into soft, low-contrast {{secondary_color}} distant horizons. Ambient twilight lighting washes over the landscape, punctuated by soft, diffused {{accent_color}} glows that suggest distant or hidden light sources. The texture mimics a chalky digital impasto with visible, faceted brush marks, creating a magical, cozy atmosphere without any specific subjects, frames, borders, or decorative overlays.
background_prompt_removebg: A serene, atmospheric environment painted in a contemporary digital style with chunky, expressive brushstrokes and opaque layering. The scene features deep atmospheric perspective, where foreground terrain defined by sweeping {{primary_color}} color blocks transitions seamlessly into soft, low-contrast {{secondary_color}} distant horizons.
